author: w3Lb
content: Plan: hoist the line_sep computation (engine.rs:326) above the per-line loop, add line_sep: &'a str to LineCtx, and use cx.line_sep instead of the hardcoded \n in apply_insert_after (engine.rs:113) and apply_insert_before (engine.rs:130) when composing Change.after metadata. Add two regression tests asserting that for a CRLF file the Change.after string for InsertAfter/InsertBefore contains \r\n and matches the joined output bytes. Verify with full workspace test + clippy + fmt.
